creator: fgorter@gmail.com
text:
Having trouble building signal-desktop from source.
Seems the required files are missing from all the distcaches for 25+ hours.
And host distcache.us-west.freebsd,org appears to be missing altogether.

===>>> Waiting on fetch & checksum for net-im/signal-desktop <<<===
===>  License AGPLv3 accepted by the user
===>   signal-desktop-6.11.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles//.
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/mikael/signal-desktop/signal-desktop-6.11.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz

Manually wrangling & renaming files from Signal app github repo doesn't help either.
Hope this is helpful.
